case_title: SF AMERICAN TAXICAB, INC. VS LIBERTY MUTUAL GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO LIBERTY MUTUAL GROUP.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,521.35 FILED BY SF AMERICAN TAXICAB, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL GROUP EIDBO, ROLF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EIDBO, ROLF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF AMERICAN TAXICAB, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL GROUP EIDBO, ROLF $1,870.80 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,930.80, DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL GROUP DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2338.35; AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
